reviews.review_description: I picked this up and quickly figured out the mechanics. Had a lot of fun swinging through the environments. I was able to beat it over the weekend, so it's not too long. The visuals are great, and the puzzles can be linear, but I loved it so much I picked up the sequel. I highly recommend checking this one out.

One of the most unique and charming games I’ve ever played.The kind of game that makes me think that VR has something to offer that no flat screen game can compete with.

Everything in this game is stellar,…the physics,the visuals, the narrative voices…,the soundtrack (the selection screen track is superb)
I find this game extremely polished.

Yupitergrad 2´s gotta be insane!
I recommend this game to anyone,this is a must have.
Kudos to the team!

Where do I even start? The graphics, the movement, the puzzles, all of it is amazing! I genuinely have complaints about this game! I got it on sale for $8, but even the base 15 is an amazing deal! If you have some spare change, I would definitely recommend getting this game.
Just a bit too short for the money. Finished it in two sessions. 😁

reviews.review_title: Great Game, but I Wish it had
reviews.review_description:
As the title says this is a great game. It's a good story and has tons of replayability with the 50 time mode levels. The one thing I wish the devs would add is a way to replay the training tutorial. It is one of the best tutorials and I have plenty of friends and family that would love the game but instead of them being able to learn it by playing the outstanding tutorial, they have to put on the headset while I try to explain to them what to do and how to do it. This hasn't worked very well. 

DEVS: Please add a way to replay the tutorial for this great game.

developer_response.body:
Hi Vinny,
Thank you for your appreciation and we are glad that you want to show the game to your friends and family as well!
The easiest way to explain the controls to them is to start the campaign mode from the beginning - then in a few minutes they will be able to learn the control rules themselves. Just select the first level from the onhand menu. It is always available :)

Best wishes from Gamedust Team!

reviews.review_description: This game is basically portal in VR

reviews.review_title: i’m the first one star review
reviews.review_description: this game cool

This is the first review I’ve written but this game is a amazing single player experience although the campaigns a little short the atmosphere and gameplay make up for it and even after the campaign there’s tons of level on the time attack mode if you want to try a single player game try this one the atmosphere is so nice.

It's the first game I take and it's the best. I hope the developer will make us another masterclass with the same gameplay because  the story mode is to short. But the other mode are great when you finish the game.
Also I think that it could be fun to swing with more space like swarm (swarn is cool but yupitergrad is way better, because it's more realistic). Btw some enemy to kill isn't a bad idea, if it's just few human

I absolutely LOVE this game, it’s just so much sheer fun. It’s a near perfect game. There is just one feature, a single feature, that this game lacks and needs. It’s multiplayer. I feel like adding multiplayer to this game would add so much more to the game. It should be where you get a room code to tell your friends or join a public lobby. I just really want to race side-by-side with some of my friends. So please devs, add this.

This game is amazing I have only have two gripes for anyone new to vr be careful this game can give newbies a mad bout of motion sickness so be careful and the game is short but it is the most replayable game I’ve ever played and every minute every second of this game is breathtakingly awesome 11/10 would recommend

reviews.review_title: Easily the most fun game I own.
reviews.review_description: Don't think, just buy this game it is SOOOOO fun.  I never had any problems with motion sickness either, which is wild for how much your moving around.  I'm not the most seasoned of VR players either, but this game is just everything you could want.  This is a MUST-OWN!

This is a great game that makes you feel like spider man. It has a good, but short campaign and 20 time attack levels. You’ll have fun with the story and you will find your self trying over and over again to beat your last time in time attack. It is great for the price, and I would definitely recommend

This game is so so fun, a bit if a learning curve if you want to be really good at swinging but this is my favorite VR game so far! Super fun to swing like Spider-Man plus another mode of locomotion that helps slight adjustments, I got lost in the new Christmas game mode with the rings it is so fun! It can get a little nauseating at times because you are swinging through the air quite fast at times but it’s good to take breaks anyway. 10/10 game and for the 
price it’s a fantastic deal !!

developer_response.body:
Great that you liked it! We're always happy when players confirm that they like flying in Yupitergrad.
I would also like to note that the mode you are talking about - Gymnasion - was added in September and it allows everyone to practice acrobatics as long as they want in the biggest gym in space!

reviews.review_description:
This is a fluid, fast-paced grappling game that is well worth the price! I have been watching this daily waiting for it to come out and it was so worth the wait! The levels are fun and challenging, but they never get you feeling stuck and frustrated. The voice acting is great and the jokes are SUPER funny if you know a bit about the Soviet Union and Communism. Easily my favorite game on VR yet! Love the game and hope more people get and enjoy it too! 


Love the developers and can’t wait to see what they do next!

This game was super fun to play through, the only complaint I have is that the campaign in it only took a few hours. But after the campaign there is also a “time attack” game mode where you swing through smaller maps trying to get the fastest time. All in all the game is great and super fun.

reviews.review_title: game with very fun mouvement mechanic
reviews.review_description:
A refreshing game with lots of replayablity. the story is a bit short but the level are really fun to swing and navigate in, and the time attack mode really add to the game. 

 I think i have just one complaint, about a bugs with the game achievement, they don't seem to unlock at all.

I played this game two times in a row - this is how fun it is (and I think, I'll be soon playing it again). Swinging across space station is a cool concept, but the controls are something that gives Yupitergrad a heart.  You're a astronaut, you go to Jupiter, and of course - there's a problem with the engine, and there's nobody in place that could help you. So you take that plunger-swinging device, and... swing like a Tarzan. For VR games it's fresh and easy to learn mechanics. The game has a very nice vibe, colors, and runs really smooth. It looks like Oculus Quest is made for experiences like this. 2021 starts scarcely and Yupitergrad already could be one of the hidden gems of the year.
Excellent game, love the swinging and the Russian-ness!

Game is really nice looking and feeling.
   5 stars from me
